en.extract:
The blue-fronted blue flycatcher (Eumyias hoevelli), also known as the blue-fronted flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.  It is endemic to Indonesia.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''blue-fronted blue flycatcher''' ('''''Eumyias hoevelli'''''), also known as the '''blue-fronted flycatcher''', is a [[species]] of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].  It is [[endemic]] to [[Indonesia]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical]] or [[tropical]] moist [[montane forest]]s.
